reason: Verified that the Super Agent successfully opens a browser, navigates to https://example.com, and returns the correct page title "Example Domain" in its response.
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully showing the Super Agent interface with a list of available agents.

Step 2: Found the "QA-20260330-183858-099c" agent in the sidebar and clicked it - The agent's chat interface opened successfully, showing "Start a conversation with QA-20260330-183858-099c" and a message input field.
Step 3: Typed and sent the message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." - The message was successfully sent, and the agent status changed to "working".

Step 4: Waited up to 3 minutes for a response - The agent completed the task in 14 seconds and returned a response with all browser tool calls executed successfully (Open Browser, Page Snapshot, Browser Command, and Close Browser).
Step 5: Verified the response mentions "Example Domain" - The response clearly states "The page title is Example Domain." in the chat interface, meeting the verification requirement.
